transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Good morning. I have an issue with an ATM. I withdrew sixty pounds last night and only received forty. The machine didn't give any error.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Can I take your name?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you. I'll need to transfer you to our ATM disputes team — they have direct access to the machine records.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Oh, okay. Before you transfer me — can you give me a reference number?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: They'll generate one for you on the other end. Which ATM was it?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. Actually, the transfer might be quicker. Let me put you through now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Transferring you now. They'll have all the details.

planted_violations: failed to verify customer identity before discussing account
transferred without raising any discrepancy report or providing reference number
interrupted customer mid-sentence to complete transfer
